category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts XML to another format based on XSL or other tools; official Pagure project is the upstream for xmlto.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xmlto; official Pagure project and Homebrew formula use xmlto.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Pagure project; no separate dedicated docs site was found, so the official project/README surface is the best documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Pagure git-centered project URL for xmlto and source archive is served from pagure.io/xmlto.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies XML conversion via XSL/tools; package dependencies and upstream context indicate DocBook/XSL workflows.
